subject: Save-reconsolidation gate behavior and destructive merge/deprecate writes on an isolated in-memory database with the production schema.
flagUnderTest: SPECKIT_RECONSOLIDATION_ENABLED (orchestrator core gate SPECKIT_RECONSOLIDATION exercised here)

checks.name: GATE-OFF reconsolidate returns null when SPECKIT_RECONSOLIDATION=false
CHECKPOINT present for folder → gate true
CHECKPOINT folder-scoped row does not satisfy a different folder
MERGE-WRITE routes to merge at sim >= MERGE_THRESHOLD
MERGE-WRITE creates a supersedes edge (predecessor retired)
MERGE-WRITE merged row keeps the old line and gains the new line
DEPRECATE-WRITE routes to conflict in the [CONFLICT, MERGE) band
DEPRECATE-WRITE marks the existing distinct row deprecated
COMPLEMENT routes to complement below CONFLICT_THRESHOLD
COMPLEMENT leaves the existing row active (no destructive write)
